query_result.reasoning:
Now I have the information I need. Let me summarize:

**Q4 FY 2025 Pre-tax margin guidance (from Q3 earnings call / Q4 guidance):**
- Range: 10.8% to 10.9%
- The high end of the guidance was 10.9%

**Q4 FY 2025 Actual pre-tax margin:**
- 11.6%

So, the actual result of 11.6% beat the guidance range.

The question asks: "Express result as BPS difference"

BPS = basis points = 1/100 of a percentage point.

The guidance range was 10.8% - 10.9%. The actual was 11.6%.

Let me think about what comparison to use. The guidance was a range. Let me check what "beat or miss" means in this context.

From the marketbeat.com transcript: "Our pre-tax profit margin was 70 basis points above the high end of our plan."

And from fintool: "Pretax Margin (%) | Q4 FY2025 | 10.8–10.9% | 11.6% | Raised (beat) | +70 bps vs high end of plan"

So, the actual was 11.6% and the high end of guidance was 10.9%. The difference is 11.6% - 10.9% = 0.7 percentage points = 70 basis points.

Let me also verify this from the parse of the Q3 earnings transcript or the Q4 earnings release itself.
